headline: The Bull Case For RTX (RTX) Could Change Following Major UK Training Win And AI Advances
summary: In July 2026, Omnia Training announced a £2.00 billion, 15-year UK Ministry of Defence contract for the British Army’s digitally enabled collective training, led by RaytheonUK alongside Capita, Cervus, Rheinmetall UK and Skyral, while RTX’s Raytheon and Pratt & Whitney units advanced missile defense and AI-driven engine inspection capabilities. Together, these moves highlight RTX’s push deeper into high-tech defence training, next-generation interceptors and AI-enabled aerospace maintenance,...
